---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a change in behavior
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that boxkite doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? If this touches pod security context, RBAC, or
network policy, please say so explicitly — those changes get extra review.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate this (links, prior art, related
issues).
